message:
fix: Handle pointer-to-tuple and string literals in print()

- Add handling for pointer-to-tuple args (codegen produces &.{...})
- Add handling for null/optional types to print "None"
- Add handling for string literals (*const [N:0]u8)
- Update formatIntBuf to bufPrint for Zig 0.15 compatibility

Fixes unit tests that use print() with various argument types.
